title: Exploratory Data Analysis Plan
description: Plan a first pass over an unfamiliar dataset.
content:
I have a dataset and want to understand it: {{dataset}}

Give me an EDA plan: what to check first (shape, types, missingness, duplicates), the distributions and relationships worth plotting, the data-quality red flags to watch for, and the questions this data can and cannot answer. Prioritize the checks that most often reveal problems before they bite. Suggest concrete code if I tell you the tool.
